Using Proxy in Vite to Fix CORS Issues
Frontend devs hit CORS constantly. Walkthrough of Vite's built-in proxy — string form, options form, and how to route dev requests through to dodge CORS.
Setting the Correct Build Path for Vue CLI and Vite

This post covers how to properly set the build path for Vue CLI and Vite. It actually matters a lot — if you don't set it right, both your local dev and post-build paths will break. So here's how to do it correctly.

I previously shared "The Complete Express + Imgur Upload Tutorial", so this time I'm covering Firebase Storage upload. I'll walk through every step clearly because this one's a bit more complex.
Building a Discord Chatbot with OpenAI GPT-3

This post walks through building a Discord chatbot using OpenAI GPT-3 — one that can reply to messages. Discord is actually a really good fit for integrating with OpenAI. The post focuses on GPT-3, but the sample code includes GPT-3.5 commits too.
Build Your First LINE Bot with Node.js — Using OpenAI GPT-3 and GPT-3.5 as Examples

OpenAI's ChatGPT has been blowing up recently, and OpenAI also exposes an API we can integrate with. This post focuses on GPT-3 but also covers how to switch to ChatGPT API. We'll use Node.js to build a LINE chatbot backed by OpenAI.
One ni to Rule Them All? Replace npm/yarn/pnpm/bun with antfu/ni

Ever wondered something? When you pick up someone else's project, do you run `npm install` or `yarn install`? With so many package installers out there, you have to open the project to figure out which one. This post introduces a really clever solution — `ni`.
